summary: Bug Fix Verified: Form submission error 'Failed to submit form' is fixed. Root cause was frontend calling undefined function fetchComplianceRequirements() after successful API call. Fix: Replaced with fetchData() at lines 1653 and 1680 in EmployeeProfilePage.js.

issues: Minor: Console warning about missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement recommended

passed_tests: ✅ Backend: Form re-submission (edit flow) works correctly
✅ Backend: Compliance requirements show form submissions
✅ Frontend: Edit button opens form modal
✅ Frontend: Form submission shows success toast 'submitted successfully'
✅ Frontend: View Form button opens modal with submitted data
✅ Frontend: Verify Form button works and shows 'Form verified successfully'
✅ Frontend: No 'Failed to submit form' error after submission
✅ Frontend: Form data persists after refresh (shown in View Form modal)
critical_code_review_comments: Fix verified: fetchComplianceRequirements() replaced with fetchData() at line 1653 (handleFormSubmit)
Fix verified: fetchComplianceRequirements() replaced with fetchData() at line 1681 (handleVerifyFormSubmission)
No remaining references to fetchComplianceRequirements() in EmployeeProfilePage.js
Backend API /api/form-submissions returns 200 for all form types
Form submission correctly supersedes previous submissions (version tracking works)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test employee and form submissions
context_for_next_testing_agent: Form submission bug fix verified. All 7 form types (health_screening, induction, interview_record, recruitment_checklist, staff_personal_info, hmrc_starter_checklist, equal_opportunities) work correctly. Edit flow, View Form modal, and Verify Form flow all working. No 'Failed to submit form' error appears after successful submission.

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Frontend called undefined function fetchComplianceRequirements() after successful API call in handleFormSubmit and handleVerifyFormSubmission functions
reproduction_steps: 3. Click Fill Form or Edit on any form-based requirement
5. API call succeeds (200) but then fetchComplianceRequirements() throws error
6. Error caught and 'Failed to submit form' toast shown
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Replaced fetchComplianceRequirements() with fetchData() at lines 1653 and 1680 in EmployeeProfilePage.js
rca_of_the_issue.verification: Form submission now shows success toast and data persists correctly
